# Xberg

> High-performance document intelligence library with a Rust core and polyglot SDKs. Extract text, metadata, and structured data from 96 file formats including PDF, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX, HTML, images (with OCR), email, archives, and more.

Xberg provides async/sync APIs, text chunking, language detection, keyword extraction, and an extensible plugin system. It is 10-50x faster than pure-Python alternatives thanks to its Rust core.

## Getting Started

- [Installation](https://docs.xberg.io/getting-started/installation/): Install Xberg for Python, TypeScript, Rust, Go, Java/Kotlin JVM, Kotlin Android, C#, Ruby, PHP, Elixir, R, Dart, Swift, Zig, C, or WebAssembly
- [Quick Start](https://docs.xberg.io/getting-started/quickstart/): Get started with document extraction in minutes

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://docs.xberg.io/concepts/architecture/): Rust core with polyglot bindings architecture
- [Extraction Pipeline](https://docs.xberg.io/concepts/extraction-pipeline/): How document extraction works
- [Plugin System](https://docs.xberg.io/concepts/plugin-system/): Extend Xberg with custom extractors and backends
- [Reranking](https://docs.xberg.io/concepts/reranking/): Query-time document reranking with cross-encoders
- [MIME Detection](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/extraction/#mime-type-detection): Automatic file format detection
- [Performance](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/development/#performance): Performance characteristics and optimization

## Guides

- [Extraction Basics](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/extraction/): Core extraction functionality
- [Configuration](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/configuration/): Configuration options
- [OCR](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/ocr/): Optical character recognition setup with Tesseract, EasyOCR, or PaddleOCR
- [Element-Based Output](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/output-formats/#element-based-output): Structured element extraction
- [Document Structure](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/output-formats/#document-structure): Hierarchical tree-based document output
- [PDF Hierarchy](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/output-formats/#pdf-hierarchy-detection): PDF hierarchy detection using K-means clustering
- [Keyword Extraction](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/keywords/): YAKE and RAKE keyword extraction
- [Advanced Features](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/advanced/): Advanced usage patterns
- [Audio and Video Transcription](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/transcription/): Whisper ONNX transcription for MP3, M4A, WAV, WebM, and MP4 audio tracks
- [Named-Entity Recognition](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/ner/): Detect people, organisations, locations, and caller-supplied zero-shot labels via gline-rs or LLM
- [Reranking](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/reranking/): Cross-encoder document reranking for RAG retrieval
- [Redaction & Anonymisation](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/redaction/): Strip PII from extracted text with the pattern engine plus optional NER backend
- [Document Summarisation](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/summarization/): Extractive TextRank (local) or LLM abstractive summaries
- [Document Translation](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/translation/): Translate content into a BCP-47 target language via any liter-llm provider
- [Page Classification](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/page-classification/): Per-page LLM classification against caller-supplied label sets
- [VLM Image Captions](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/image-captions/): Caption every extracted image with a vision-capable LLM
- [QR-Code Detection](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/qr-codes/): Pure-Rust QR decoding over extracted images
- [Docker Deployment](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/docker/): Docker container deployment
- [Kubernetes Deployment](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/kubernetes/): Kubernetes deployment guide
- [API Server](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/api-server/): REST API server setup
- [Creating Plugins](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/plugins/): Build custom extractor plugins
- [AI Coding Assistants](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/agent-skills/): Install the plugin with `/plugin marketplace add xberg-io/plugins` then `/plugin install xberg@xberg` — ships agent skills plus an MCP server, works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Copilot, and opencode
- [C# Bindings](https://docs.xberg.io/guides/csharp/): C# binding usage guide

## CLI

- [CLI Usage](https://docs.xberg.io/cli/usage/): Command-line interface reference

## API Reference

- [Python API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-python/): Python binding reference
- [TypeScript API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-typescript/): TypeScript/Node.js binding reference
- [WebAssembly API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-wasm/): WebAssembly binding reference
- [PHP API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-php/): PHP binding reference
- [C# API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-csharp/): C# binding reference
- [Go API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-go/): Go binding reference
- [Java API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-java/): Java binding reference
- [Kotlin Android API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-kotlin-android/): Kotlin Android AAR binding reference
- [Rust API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-rust/): Rust core library reference
- [Ruby API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-ruby/): Ruby binding reference
- [R API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-r/): R binding reference
- [Elixir API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-elixir/): Elixir binding reference
- [C API](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/api-c/): C FFI binding reference
- [Configuration Reference](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/configuration/): Full configuration options
- [Environment Variables](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/environment-variables/): XBERG_* environment variable reference
- [File Size Limits](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/file-size-limits/): Upload and processing size limits
- [Format Support](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/formats/): Supported file formats (96)
- [Types](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/types/): Type definitions
- [Errors](https://docs.xberg.io/reference/errors/): Error types and handling

## Xberg Ecosystem

- [Xberg Enterprise](https://enterprise.xberg.io): Managed extraction API with SDKs, dashboards, and observability
- [crawlberg](https://docs.crawlberg.xberg.io): Web crawling and scraping with HTML to Markdown and headless-Chrome fallback
- [html-to-markdown](https://docs.html-to-markdown.xberg.io): Fast, lossless HTML to Markdown engine
- [liter-llm](https://docs.liter-llm.xberg.io): Universal LLM API client with native bindings for 14 languages and 143 providers
- [tree-sitter-language-pack](https://docs.tree-sitter-language-pack.xberg.io): Tree-sitter grammars and code-intelligence primitives

## Migration

- [From Unstructured](https://docs.xberg.io/migration/from-unstructured/): Migrate from the Unstructured library
- [v5 Image Indices](https://docs.xberg.io/migration/v5.0-image-indices/): Update page and chunk image references to use `image_indices`

## Optional

- [Features Overview](https://docs.xberg.io/features/): Complete feature list
- [Changelog](https://docs.xberg.io/CHANGELOG/): Release history
- [Contributing](https://docs.xberg.io/contributing/): Contribution guidelines
- [Comparisons](https://docs.xberg.io/comparisons/xberg-vs-unstructured/): Xberg vs alternatives
